available_mods.name: Show Waits
available_mods.desc: Add some UI that shows waits.

yaku: Winning on a tile that is the last of its kind.

actions: You may win with one of the following:
- Four sets (sequences or triplets) and a pair.
- (Thirteen Orphans) All thirteen terminal/honor tiles plus one forming a pair.
- (Knitted Straight) A knitted straight plus one set and a pair. A knitted straight consists of 147 of one suit, 258 of a second suit, and 369 of a third suit.
- (Knitted Hand) 14 unique tiles from the following set: 147 of one suit, 258 of a second suit, 369 of a third suit, all winds, and all dragons.
Your hand must score at least 8 Fan to win. (Flowers don't count.)

You have a triplet of terminals or honors. This triplet can be either called or concealed. Having a pung of dragons, prevalent winds, or seat winds instead awards the 2-fan yaku Dragon Pung, Prevalent Wind, or Seat Wind respectively. Repeatable.
You drew the winning tile yourself.
You are only waiting for one kind of tile, and the wait is a 'middle' wait (like 35 waiting for 4).
You have two of the same sequence in different suits.
You lack any tiles from one of the three suits. (Honors and flowers are suitless, so your hand can still contain these.)
You are only waiting for one kind of tile, and the wait is a pair wait like 3 waiting for another 3.
You are only waiting for one kind of tile, and the wait is 12 waiting for 3, or 90 waiting for 7.
You have called a kong or added a tile to a called triplet to make a kong.
You have 123 and 789 of the same suit.
Two identical chows in the same suit.
You get 1 fan per flower tile, but this does not contribute to the minimum requirement of 8 fan.
All of your sets are sequences. In addition, you may not have any honor tiles.
You have a triplet of dragons. Having two dragon triplets instead awards the 6-fan yaku Two Dragon Pungs.
You have never called a tile (except flowers and concealed kongs, or except as the winning tile).
Your hand consists of only number tiles 2-8. (Ignores flowers.)
You have a triplet of the wind matching your seat.
You have a triplet of the prevalent (round) wind.
You have two triplets of the same number (in different suits). Repeatable.
Your hand contains all four of a tile (not in a kong). Repeatable.

You have two triplets in hand (not called). Either one may be a Concealed Kong. Having two Concealed Kongs instead awards the 8-fan yaku Two Concealed Kongs. Having three or four Concealed Pungs instead awards the 16-fan yaku Three Concealed Pungs or the 64-fan yaku Four Concealed Pungs respectively.
You have exactly one concealed kong.
Have no calls except concealed kongs, and win off a self draw.
Win on the fourth copy of a tile. The other three copies must be visible to all players (so cannot be in your hand).
Each of your sets and pair contains a terminal or honor tile.
You have two kongs, both formed by calling the fourth tile or by adding the fourth tile to a called triplet.
You have something like 123 234 345, with each sequence being in a different suit.
Your hand has each of the five kinds of tiles: characters, circles, bamboo, winds, and dragons. (Ignores flowers.)
Your hand consists of one suit plus honors. (Ignores flowers.)
All of your sets are triplets (or kongs).
Have four calls and win off a discard or by robbing a kong.
You have two kongs, one melded (formed by calling the fourth tile or by adding the fourth tile to a called triplet) and one concealed.
You have three of the same sequence in different suits.
You have 123 456 789, all of different suits.
None of the other fan apply to your hand.
Your hand is composed of tiles from the following set: 1234589 of circles, 245689 of bamboo, and white dragon. (Ignores flowers.)
You have consecutive triplets in the pattern 111 222 333 in different suits.
Win off the replacement tile after calling a flower of a kong.
Win off the tile someone tried to add to a pung.
Your hand consists only of the numbers 6789. (Ignores flowers.)
Your hand consists only of the numbers 1234. (Ignores flowers.)
You win from having 14 unique tiles from the following set: 147 of one suit, 258 of a second suit, 369 of a third suit, all winds, and all dragons.
You win with hand containing a knitted straight: 147 of one suit, 258 of a second suit, 369 of a third suit.
You have 123 456 789 in the same suit.
You have something like 123 234 345 in the same suit, or 123 345 567 in the same suit.
You have three concealed triplets. Triplets obtained via win by self-draw count as concealed, but triplets obtained via win by discard/robbing a kong are not concealed.
All of your sets and your pair contain a five.
You have three triplets of the same number.
You have Two Terminal Chows (123 789) twice in different suits, plus a pair of fives.
Your hand consists of one suit only, no honors. (ignores flowers)
You won with a seven-pair hand. Repeated pairs are allowed (and award the 2-Fan yaku Tile Hog).
Greater Honors and Knitted Tiles (24 Fan)
You have one of each wind and dragon, plus 7 unique tiles from the following set: 147 of one suit, 258 of a second suit, and 369 of a third suit.
You have consecutive triplets in the pattern 111222333, of the same suit.
Your hand consists only of the numbers 789. (Ignores flowers.)
Your hand consists only of the numbers 123. (Ignores flowers.)
Your hand consists only of the numbers 456. (Ignores flowers.)
Your hand consists of triplets and pairs of even numbers (2468) only.
You have three of the same sequence in the same suit.
Your hand consists of 1, 9, and honor tiles only. (Ignores flowers.)
You have something like 123 234 345 456 in the same suit.
You have consecutive triplets in the pattern 111222333444, of the same suit.
You have four of the same sequence in the same suit.
You have two dragon triplets and a dragon pair.
You have four concealed triplets. Triplets obtained via win by self-draw count as concealed, but triplets obtained via win by discard/robbing a kong are not concealed.
You have three wind triplets and a wind pair.
Your hand is all honor tiles.
Your hand consists of 1 and 9 tiles only. (Ignores flowers.)
You have exactly 123 123 55 789 789 in the same suit.
You have one of each terminal and honor tile, one of them forming a pair.
Your hand consists of tiles from the set 23468 of bamboo and green dragon. (Ignores flowers.)
You have 11 22 33 44 55 66 77 in one suit. It does not have to start at 1.
Your hand is concealed and is all one suit in the nine gates shape (1112345678999 + one extra tile).
